---
title: "How Apple AirPods Work"
description: "So much wonderful tech and engineering goes into this teeny tiny daily driver."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-08-28"
categories: [Apple, video, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Watch the explainer on YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/PB_8dGKh9JI)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

So much wonderful tech and engineering goes into this teeny tiny daily driver [[1]](#ref-1).

(you also get to learn why dogs tilt their heads when confused)

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] "How Apple AirPods Work." *YouTube*. <https://youtu.be/PB_8dGKh9JI>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_how-apple-airpods-work-activity-7367022162886553600-Bf8h).*
